title: selaginella keralensis
intro: Selaginella keralensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Selaginellaceae, commonly known as the spikemoss, which is a type of vascular plant that reproduces via spores rather than seeds. This plant is native to India and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Selaginella keralensis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and processed into capsules, tablets, or teas, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health issues.
